name: leanstral-solana-skill
description: Agent skill for generating formal Lean 4 proofs using Mistral's Leanstral model - perfect for verifying Solana programs, Rust code, and smart contracts

scripts.postinstall: cargo build --release && mkdir -p bin && cp target/release/leanstral bin/ && chmod +x bin/leanstral
scripts.prepack: cargo build --release && mkdir -p bin && cp target/release/leanstral bin/ && chmod +x bin/leanstral

author: abishekk92
